creator: kenji@k2r.org
text:
Jeremy and all:
 
 Tested on the benchmarks/bonnie++ as in the ports svn r332956, and
 modified USE_GCC to "USE_GCC=any" as suggested.
 It worked fine on my current environment without the compilation errors
 FreeBSD minimax.priv.k2r.org 10.0-BETA4 FreeBSD 10.0-BETA4 #19
 r258903: Wed Dec  4 12:28:44 JST 2013
 root@minimax.priv.k2r.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/K2RKERNEL  amd64
 which only has the base clang and port lang/gcc46.
 
 The explanation is surely in the Section 5.8.8 (USE_GCC) of FreeBSD
 Porter's Handbook.
 http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/makefile-depend.html
 Thanks for the fix and my apologies for having suggested an incorrect
 option for USE_GCC.
 
 Kenji Rikitake
